name: iconifier
description: Generate and apply custom macOS folder icons for subfolders, matching the style of any icons on peers.

interface.shortDescription: Custom macOS folder icons that match your existing style.
interface.longDescription: Reads peer-folder icons to infer the style, generates a per-folder icon (emoji, SF Symbol, or AI), previews in the browser, applies via NSWorkspace.
defaultPrompt: Iconify the subfolders of this directory.
Give my ~/Projects folders matching SF Symbol icons.
Replace the icon on the acme-co folder with something cleaner.
